Nifty Island is not yet available on mobile.

Join a community-built world & win wild prizes

Compete

Participate in competitive quests to win airdrop points, NFTs, and crypto!

Create

Create your own island, upload custom assets, and design a variety of games using an intuitive in-game toolset.

Host

Host events on your island and earn airdrop points when people visit and play your games!

Track your earnings

Use the rewards dashboard to track and maximize your ISLAND earnings.
